# Web research

Follow this procedure when asked to research a topic on the web.

1. Search for the query.
2. Open the most relevant results.
3. Cross-check claims across at least two sources.
4. Summarize the findings and cite the sources.

See `references/sources.md` for the source-evaluation rubric.
